expected_behavior: A narrative episode that already ships id3/pc20/rssInline chapters from the creator. Pre-au2v.1: chapter signal absent (production behavior was the same — creator chapters are read by other code paths but the chapter generation phase didn't exist). Post-au2v.1: ChapterGenerationPhase short-circuits via creator-chapter precedence, charging zero FM cost and zero latency, and emitting NO inferred plan. This guards against the failure mode where an FM-inferred plan would override the creator's near-ground-truth labels.
synthesis_notes: Models a produced narrative show that consistently ships chapter markers (e.g., the ID3 chapter standard widely used by produced series). Creator-chapter detection is a per-trace boolean today (the FrozenTrace v3 schema does not yet carry the field directly — bead 4 will add it).
